untranslatable_reason: Signal is based on calendar-driven month-end entries/exits (end of February, July, October) and seasonal patterns ('lows in June and September'). The allowed indicators do not include calendar/date-based conditions or seasonal decomposition. The operator 'is' does not support calendar dates or seasonal regimes. This requires a custom calendar module or date comparison logic outside the standard indicator set.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_10 is a purely seasonal/calendar-based strategy with two separate trades: (1) Short December corn Feb→Jul, (2) Long December corn Jul→Oct. No price-based entry signals are provided—only month-end dates. The pattern basis references 'month-end average changes' and seasonal lows, which cannot be expressed using the allowed indicators without access to historical seasonal decomposition or calendar functions.
